name: superpowers-symfony
description: A Symfony-focused Codex plugin providing TDD, Doctrine ORM, API Platform, Messenger, Voters, quality checks, and pragmatic architecture workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Symfony workflows for TDD, Doctrine, API Platform, Messenger, and quality checks.
interface.longDescription: Superpowers Symfony is a local Codex plugin for Symfony developers. It packages pragmatic guidance for TDD, Doctrine ORM, API Platform, Messenger, Voters, testing, and code quality workflows.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a Symfony feature with TDD.
Review this Doctrine code for correctness.
Suggest the right Symfony or API Platform workflow.
